---
title: "code-2026-04-20"
author: "Ben Moolman"
date: "2026-04-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Functions in R and your First Scraper

```{r}
url <- "https://www.baseball-reference.com/awards/hof_2025.shtml"
library(rvest)
site <- read_html(url)

```

First Function

```{r}

```

Your Turn - Scraper Function

```{r}
bbwaa_scraper <- function(url) {
}
```

Your Turn - Expanding

```{r}

```
